---
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    anchor-location: none
    page-layout: full
echo: false
message: false
warning: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ===================================================
   Landing page — minimal / editorial overrides
   Scoped to .landing so the global theme is untouched
   =================================================== */
.landing {
  --ink: #111418;
  --ink-soft: #3b424a;
  --muted: #6b7280;
  --rule: #e6e8ec;
  --bg: #ffffff;
  --bg-soft: #fafafa;
  --accent: #1684bb;
  --accent-ink: #0c5a82;
  --maxw: 1080px;
  color: var(--ink);
  font-feature-settings: "ss01", "kern";
}

.landing .l-wrap {
  max-width: var(--maxw);
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 1.25rem;
}

.landing .l-section {
  padding: 5rem 0;
  border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);
}
.landing .l-section.first { border-top: 0; }

.landing .l-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--muted);
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
}

.landing h1,
.landing h2,
.landing h3 {
  color: var(--ink);
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
}
.landing h1 { font-size: clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 3.6rem); line-height: 1.05; }
.landing h2 { font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 3vw, 2.1rem); line-height: 1.15; }
.landing h3 { font-size: 1.15rem; line-height: 1.3; }

.landing p { font-size: 1.05rem; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--ink-soft); }
.landing .l-lede {
  font-size: clamp(1.1rem, 1.6vw, 1.25rem);
  color: var(--ink-soft);
  max-width: 56ch;
  margin: 0 0 2rem;
}

/* Hero */
.landing .l-hero {
  padding: 6.5rem 0 4rem;
  border-top: 0;
}
.landing .l-hero-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  align-items: center;
}
@media (min-width: 820px) {
  .landing .l-hero-row { grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr; }
}
.landing .l-portrait {
  width: 220px;
  height: 220px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  object-fit: cover;
  justify-self: center;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.04), 0 18px 36px -22px rgba(17,20,24,0.25);
}
.landing .l-cta-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
}
.landing .l-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.45rem;
  padding: 0.7rem 1.15rem;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: 1px solid var(--ink);
  background: var(--ink);
  color: #fff !important;
  transition: transform 0.18s ease, box-shadow 0.18s ease, background 0.18s;
}
.landing .l-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 24px -14px rgba(17,20,24,0.6); }
.landing .l-btn--ghost {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--ink) !important;
  border-color: var(--rule);
}
.landing .l-btn--ghost:hover { background: var(--bg-soft); }

/* Selected work grid */
.landing .l-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
}
@media (min-width: 700px)  { .landing .l-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
@media (min-width: 1000px) { .landing .l-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); } }

.landing .l-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  border: 1px solid var(--rule);
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: var(--bg);
  overflow: hidden;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease;
}
.landing .l-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--ink);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 40px -28px rgba(17,20,24,0.25);
}
.landing .l-card-media {
  aspect-ratio: 16 / 9;
  background: var(--bg-soft);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.landing .l-card-media img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
}
.landing .l-card-body {
  padding: 1.25rem 1.25rem 1.5rem;
}
.landing .l-card-tag {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--accent-ink);
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem;
}
.landing .l-card-title { margin: 0 0 0.35rem; font-size: 1.1rem; }
.landing .l-card-desc { margin: 0; font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.55; }

/* Section header row with link */
.landing .l-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: baseline;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.landing .l-row h2 { margin: 0; }
.landing .l-row a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--ink-soft);
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);
  padding-bottom: 1px;
}
.landing .l-row a:hover { color: var(--ink); border-color: var(--ink); }

/* Toolkit chips */
.landing .l-chips {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.55rem;
  margin-top: 1rem;
}
.landing .l-chip {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--ink-soft);
  background: var(--bg-soft);
  border: 1px solid var(--rule);
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: 0.4rem 0.85rem;
}

/* Approach two-column list */
.landing .l-cols {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 2rem;
}
@media (min-width: 820px) { .landing .l-cols { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
.landing .l-cols h3 { margin-bottom: 0.4rem; }
.landing .l-cols p { margin: 0; }

/* Contact */
.landing .l-contact {
  background: var(--bg-soft);
  border: 1px solid var(--rule);
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 2.5rem;
  text-align: center;
}
.landing .l-contact h2 { margin-bottom: 0.5rem; }
.landing .l-contact p { max-width: 50ch; margin: 0 auto 1.5rem; }

/* Resume note */
.landing .l-resume {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--rule);
  border-radius: 12px;
  margin-top: 2rem;
}
.landing .l-resume p { margin: 0; font-size: 0.95rem; }

@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .landing .l-hero { padding: 4rem 0 2.5rem; }
  .landing .l-section { padding: 3.5rem 0; }
  .landing .l-contact { padding: 1.75rem; }
}
</style>

<main class="landing">

<!-- Hero -->
<section class="l-hero">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-hero-row">
      <div>
        <p class="l-eyebrow">Brian Cervantes Alvarez</p>
        <h1>Statistician and data scientist building tools people actually use.</h1>
        <p class="l-lede">
          I design explainable models, ship interactive analytics, and teach the
          ideas behind them so adoption sticks. R, Python, SQL, Shiny — and a bias
          toward clear answers over clever methods.
        </p>
        <div class="l-cta-row">
          <a href="#contact" class="l-btn" aria-label="Contact Brian">Get in touch</a>
          <a href="#work" class="l-btn l-btn--ghost">See selected work</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <img src="/assets/images/profile2.JPG" alt="Portrait of Brian Cervantes Alvarez"
           class="l-portrait" loading="eager">
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Selected Work -->
<section class="l-section first" id="work">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Selected work</p>
    <div class="l-row">
      <h2>Projects worth a closer look</h2>
      <a href="/content/projects/">All projects →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="l-grid">
      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/united-kingdom-car-accident-shiny-app/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/assets/images/ukCarAccident.webp" alt="UK Car Accident Shiny App">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Shiny · Analytics app</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">UK Traffic Accident Trends</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            An interactive dashboard for exploring UK incident patterns —
            filters, dynamic views, defaults that surface signal first.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/wine-multivariate-statistical-analysis/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/assets/images/redwhite.jpeg" alt="Wine Multivariate Analysis">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Statistical modeling</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Multivariate Analysis: Wine Quality</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            PCA and supervised models with diagnostics to separate signal from
            noise across correlated chemical features.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>

      <a class="l-card" href="/content/projects/yelp-business-reviews-shiny-app/">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/assets/images/yelpBurst.svg" alt="Yelp Business Reviews Shiny App">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Shiny · Geospatial</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Yelp Business Reviews</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            A spatial review explorer with map-linked filters, density layers,
            and per-business summaries.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Writing -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Writing</p>
    <div class="l-row">
      <h2>Recent post</h2>
      <a href="/content/blog/">All posts →</a>
    </div>

    <div class="l-grid">
      <a class="l-card" href="/content/blog/interactive-teaching-with-webr/" style="grid-column: span 1;">
        <div class="l-card-media">
          <img src="/assets/images/webR.png" alt="Interactive Teaching with webR">
        </div>
        <div class="l-card-body">
          <p class="l-card-tag">Teaching · webR</p>
          <h3 class="l-card-title">Interactive Teaching with webR</h3>
          <p class="l-card-desc">
            Browser-native, no-install R lessons built with Quarto and webR so
            students can run code inline and learn by doing.
          </p>
        </div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Approach -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">How I work</p>
    <div class="l-cols">
      <div>
        <h3>Decision-focused</h3>
        <p>Translate goals into crisp KPIs and hypotheses. Design analyses that answer "What should we do next?" not just "What happened?"</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Explainable</h3>
        <p>Train and validate with holdout and cross-validation. Prefer interpretable models (GLMs, trees, SHAP-style diagnostics) so stakeholders can trust the output.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Reliable pipelines</h3>
        <p>Auditable R, Python, and SQL pipelines with documented assumptions, reproducible runs, and failure-aware checks.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h3>Production-minded</h3>
        <p>Ship lightweight apps, instrument usage, and iterate on real-world feedback so the work compounds.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Toolkit -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <p class="l-eyebrow">Toolkit</p>
    <h2>Languages, frameworks, and platforms</h2>
    <p class="l-lede">A short list of what I reach for first on real projects.</p>
    <div class="l-chips">
      <span class="l-chip">R / Shiny</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Python</span>
      <span class="l-chip">SQL</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Statistical analysis</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Tidyverse</span>
      <span class="l-chip">scikit-learn</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Quarto</span>
      <span class="l-chip">GCP / AWS</span>
      <span class="l-chip">Consulting</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- Contact -->
<section class="l-section">
  <div class="l-wrap">
    <div class="l-contact" id="contact">
      <p class="l-eyebrow">Contact</p>
      <h2>Have a data problem worth solving?</h2>
      <p>Send a note with context and timelines and I will reply with a concrete next step.</p>
      <div class="l-cta-row" style="justify-content:center;">
        <a class="l-btn" href="mailto:briancervantesalvarez@gmail.com" aria-label="Email Brian">Email me</a>
        <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="https://linkedin.com/in/bcervantesalvarez" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">LinkedIn</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="l-resume">
      <p><strong>Looking for the full resume?</strong> Download the PDF or open it in a new tab.</p>
      <div class="l-cta-row" style="margin:0;">
        <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="/assets/documents/resume/BCA-Resume.pdf" download="Brian-Cervantes-Alvarez-Resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
        <a class="l-btn l-btn--ghost" href="/assets/documents/resume/BCA-Resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Open in new tab</a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

</main>
```
